title: What's For Dinner? | #shorts
full_text: Can you give me the names of three things that I can make at home that you will eat? I'm tired of chasing you with the dinner every time. >> Um, pasta? >> No. No. >> Grilled cheese? >> No. What? No. >> And peanut butter and jelly. >> What? What are you talking about? None of this is even food. We Why can't you eat normal food like kuri rajma ch? You told me last time that you hate you you love the the kit and the rajma and the chole. >> Mom, I never said that. >> You said that. You absolutely said that. >> No, mom. I said, "Can this be the last bowl that I ever eat?" >> No, you didn't. You You didn't exactly know what you were trying to say. That's why I fixed it.
